title: Aerospace Aluminum Alloy Rolling
entry_mechanism: Ma'aden Aluminium downstream rolling investment with aerospace alloy grade addition
executive_summary:
Aerospace aluminum alloy sheet and plate — 2xxx series (aircraft fuselage skin), 7xxx series (wing spars, structural elements), and 6xxx series (general structural) — is the second most-used structural material in commercial aircraft after composites. Saudi Arabia has Ma'aden Aluminium at Ras Al-Khair, one of the world's most cost-competitive aluminum smelters using hydropower and domestic alumina. Ma'aden currently produces standard aluminum sheet, but not to aerospace alloy grades or aerospace tolerances.

Node AM-5 targets the upgrade of Ma'aden's rolling mill to produce aerospace-grade aluminum alloy sheet: adding aerospace alloy casting capability (2024, 7075, 6061 grades), installing aerospace-grade homogenisation and rolling process controls, and achieving Nadcap accreditation for aerospace aluminum supply. The upgrade investment is significant but incremental — Ma'aden already has the core infrastructure.

The global aerospace aluminum market was valued at $8.2 billion in 2024 growing at 4.8% CAGR. Saudi Arabia's addressable aerospace aluminum opportunity — serving MA-1, CA-2, SS-1, and export to Airbus and Boeing supply chains — is estimated at $300–500 million annually at full Phase II capacity.

companies.name: Novelis (Hindalco)
companies.rationale: Novelis is the world's largest aluminum rolling company and supplies Airbus and Boeing. A Ma'aden-Novelis technical partnership for aerospace rolling brings Airbus-qualified process technology to Saudi Arabia.

companies.name: Constellium
companies.rationale: Constellium is a premier aerospace aluminum supplier (Airbus A380 and A350 structures). French company with active SABIC/Ma'aden relationship potential.

companies.name: Arconic (formerly Alcoa)
companies.rationale: Arconic produces aerospace aluminum plate and has technology licensing experience.

companies.name: SMS Group
companies.rationale: SMS Group designs and builds aluminum rolling mills and could upgrade Ma'aden's mill to aerospace grade.
companies.contact: SMS Group VP Aluminum Rolling, International

companies.name: Aleris (Howmet)
companies.rationale: Aleris (now Howmet Aerospace) produces aerospace aluminum plate with technology licensing capability.

partners.name: Ma'aden Aluminium
partners.current: Standard-grade aluminum sheet; primary aluminum production; existing rolling mill
partners.upgrade: Upgrade rolling mill to aerospace alloy capability; add 2024 and 7075 alloy casting; Nadcap accreditation; Novelis technical partnership for Airbus material qualification
partners.timeline: 36 months to first aerospace-qualified aluminum delivery

partners.name: SAMI Composites / Aerostructures
partners.upgrade: Saudi aluminum as input material for hybrid composite-metal aerospace structures; Ma'aden alloy qualification through SAMI aerospace programmes

partners.name: Airbus Supply Chain
partners.current: Major Airbus programme customer through Saudia airline orders
partners.upgrade: Airbus material qualification for Ma'aden aerospace alloy; Saudi aluminum in Airbus supply chain as IPP conversion; Airbus as first aerospace customer for Saudi aerospace aluminum

partners.name: KFUPM Materials Engineering
partners.current: Metallurgy; materials characterisation; some aerospace materials research
partners.upgrade: Aerospace aluminum metallurgy programme; Ma'aden-KFUPM alloy research partnership; Saudi metallurgists for aerospace qualification
